title: Imdaar Alpha research station
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{SpaceStation |image=[[File:ShadowSquadronPilot-XWMG.jpg]] |name=Imdaar Alpha research station |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=Factory / Research station |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=>15,000 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height=>15,000 meters |diameter= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures=Cloaking device |armament= |complement=Thousands of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] (estimated) |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |region= *[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Aeten system/Legends|Aeten system]]. According to ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', [[Aeten II/Legends|Aeten II]] is located in the Dreighton Nebula. |sector= |system=[[Dreighton Nebula/Legends|Dreighton Nebula]] |coordinates=J-6{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |xyz= |orbited=[[Imdaar Alpha]] |distance=Anchored to moon |routes= |role=*Factory *Research facility |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |constructed= |destroyed=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] |retired= |battles= |owners= |namedcrew= |captains=[[Grand_Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Martio Batch]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Sarn]] |registry= |aliases= |population= |interest= |services= |sectors= |modules= }} The '''Imdaar Alpha research station''' was a massive Imperial production facility anchored to the moon [[Imdaar Alpha]]. ==Structure== [[File:ImdaarTestPilot-SWZ.png|thumb|left|A TIE Phantom being tested by one of the station's test pilots]] The station consisted of a central cylinder, containing the access tunnels, factory facilities, docking area and [[Reactor/Legends|reactor core]]. As many as eight ships up to [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] size could dock at the sideward docking arms; Another one up to [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] size could be docked directly above the main access tunnel.
Three arms extending from the central spine further stabilized and anchored the facility on the moon's surface. ==History== Constructed under the auspices of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Martio Batch]], the facility was used for researching and producing a working prototype of a [[Stygium/Legends|Stygium]] cloaking device, and further implementing it in the [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantom]] project. During this development, Batch appointed his protege, Admiral [[Sarn]], to keep an eye on the project. The source of the crystals was [[Aeten II/Legends|Aeten II]], a planet also located in the Dreighton Nebula. While the Stygium mines on the planet had long before dried up, Batch was able to obtain previously unreachable crystals by using the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']] superweapon to destroy the planet. [[File:TIE_Phantom_factorydestroy.jpg|thumb|left|The end of the factory]] In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives [[Ru Murleen]] and [[Rookie One]] discovered the facility after the destruction of the Star Dreadnought ''[[Terror]]'' and moved in to ultimately disable its production capacity. The facility was destroyed when its reactor was damaged by the two Infiltrators and went critical. The resulting explosion destroyed several Star Destroyers docked with the station, a large portion of Imdaar Alpha's surface, and the Empire's entire surplus of TIE Phantoms, effectively ending the project. Additionally, for his perceived incompetence, Sarn was executed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who was present for a time during the events of Rookie One's infiltration. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|66|Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals}} *{{CSWECite|II||Phantom TIE V-38}} {{1stID|Imdaar Alpha research station}} *{{FFGXW|set=TIE Phantom Expansion Pack|cardname=Shadow Squadron Pilot}} *''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]'' *{{FFGXW2|set=Galactic Empire Conversion Kit|cardname=Imdaar Test Pilot}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Imdaar Alpha Forschungsstation |es=Fábrica de Fantasmas TIE }} [[Category:Asteroid bases]] [[Category:Imdaar system locations]] [[Category:Galactic Empire scientific facilities]] [[Category:Space stations in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Space stations in Wild Space]]
